"Login menu" has items: "Student", "Teacher", "Worker", "Admin"

"Course Menu" has items: "IA", "ESG"

"Period Menu" has items: "1", "2", "3"

"Name Form" has a text input "name"

"Products Menu" has items: [generated by Python Faker library] (product names)

"Product page" has: name text, price float number, "comprar" item, "estocar" item to "Admin"

---

On begin, app goes to "Login menu"

When client chooses "Worker" on "Login menu", app goes to "Name Form"

When client chooses "Teacher" on "Login menu", app goes to "Name Form"

When client chooses "Student" on "Login menu", app goes to "Course Menu"

When client chooses "IA" or "ESG" on "Course menu", app goes to "Period Menu"

When client chooses "1" or "2" or "3" on "Period Menu", app goes to "Name Form"

When client enters text on input "name" on "Name Form", app goes to "Products Menu"

When client chooses a product on "Products Menu", app goes to choosen "Product page"
